title: My Nephew Stole My Food Truck And Called Me A Volunteer. So I Parked Across The Street.
description: Eleanor spent 29 years as a cardiac nurse and poured her $50,000 pension into her nephew's culinary dream. He secretly trademarked the food truck name, fired her by text, and called her a volunteer. After winning the truck and trademark in court, she now parks across from his failed copycat, serving a spicy 'Traitor's Wrap' that outsells his bland tacos every day. #RevengeStory #FamilyBetrayal #Karma
thumb_text: I BOUGHT HIS LAST FRYER FOR $200
pinned_comment: If your nephew you raised from eight years old took your $50,000 nursing pension and then fired you claiming you were just a volunteer, what would you do? Share your story in the comments.

thumb_lines.text: HE TRADEMARKED THE NAME AND FIRED ME BY TEXT
